allow: PowerShell($files = @\('about.css', 'gallery.css', 'whatsapp.css', 'typography.css'\); $imported = @\('variables.css', 'reset.css', 'components.css', 'animations.css', 'header.css', 'footer.css', 'hero.css', 'services.css', 'before-after.css', 'review.css', 'faq.css', 'zone.css', 'booking.css', 'mobile-bar.css'\); $orphan = @\(\); foreach \($f in $files\) { if \($imported -notcontains $f\) { $orphan += $f } }; "FICHIERS ORPHELINS CSS:"; $orphan)

PowerShell($jsFiles = @\('tilt.js', 'calendly.js', 'before-after.js', 'page-loader.js', 'parallax.js', 'scroll-nav.js', 'scroll-next.js', 'animations.js', 'faq.js', 'reviews.js', 'smooth-scroll.js', 'header.js', 'anti-inspect.js'\); $imported = @\('animations.js', 'header.js', 'tilt.js', 'before-after.js', 'calendly.js', 'faq.js', 'page-loader.js', 'scroll-nav.js', 'parallax.js', 'smooth-scroll.js', 'reviews.js', 'anti-inspect.js'\); $orphan = @\(\); foreach \($f in $jsFiles\) { if \($imported -notcontains $f\) { $orphan += $f } }; "FICHIERS JS ORPHELINS:"; $orphan)

PowerShell(\(Get-ChildItem -Path "E:\\sitedtl\\assets\\images" -Recurse -File | Select-Object Extension | Sort-Object -Unique | Group-Object Extension\) | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\) fichier\(s\)" })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "E:\\sitedtl\\assets\\images" -Recurse -File | Select-Object Name, @{N='Ko';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB\)}} | Sort-Object Ko -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)
